judge_reasoning: The draft correctly identifies the $18,000 floor violation and declines, matches Dana's voice (warm, concise, no exclamation marks, 'Best, Dana'), and is staged as a draft only with m3 still unread. The one gap is criterion 2: the policy explicitly says to refer BrightPath to the monthly retainer at $6,000/month, but the draft instead offers a vague 'if budget has flexibility, hop on a call' without naming the retainer alternative at all.
